## Description
What does this PR do? Why?

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Checklist
- [ ] Server starts with `npm start` and loads all views
- [ ] Tested in browser (Chrome/Firefox)
- [ ] No new npm dependencies added (unless discussed)
- [ ] Used `escapeHtml()` for any user-generated content
- [ ] Used cyan/orange signal system (no green/red)
- [ ] Updated CLAUDE.md if routes/libs/views changed

## Screenshots
If UI change, add before/after screenshots.
